hub.title: Federation Network
hub.subtitle_opted_in: You are connected to the federation network.
hub.subtitle_opted_out: Join the federation to connect with members across partner communities.
hub.hero_description: Federation lets your timebank connect with others worldwide — share skills, exchange services, and build a stronger network together.
hub.how_it_works_0_description: Browse and connect with partner timebanks and communities around the world.
hub.how_it_works_1_description: Find and connect with members from partner communities who share your interests.
hub.how_it_works_2_description: Offer and request services across communities using your time credits.
hub.feature_privacy_description: You control exactly what information is shared with partner communities.
hub.feature_instant_description: Real-time messaging and instant notifications keep you connected.
hub.feature_network_description: Join a growing network of timebanks and communities worldwide.
hub.quick_link_0_description: Browse all partner communities in the network.
hub.quick_link_1_description: Find and connect with members from partner communities.
hub.quick_link_2_description: Send and receive messages across communities.
hub.quick_link_3_description: Browse offers and requests from partner communities.
hub.quick_link_4_description: Discover events happening across partner communities.
hub.quick_link_5_description: Configure your federation privacy and communication preferences.
hub.no_partners_description: Your community will appear here once partnerships are established.
hub.no_activity_description: Activity from partner communities will appear here.
hub.not_available_description: Federation has not been enabled for {{community}} yet.
hub.not_available_contact: Contact your community admin to request federation access.
hub.disable_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to disable federation? You will lose access to partner communities.
hub.error_load_status: Could not load federation status. Please try again.
hub.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
hub.toast_enabled_description: You are now connected to the federation network.
hub.toast_enable_error_description: Could not enable federation. Please try again.
hub.toast_disabled_description: You have been disconnected from the federation network.
hub.toast_disable_error_description: Could not disable federation. Please try again.

members.no_members_search: Try adjusting your search or filters.

members.external_profile_message: This member is on an external partner platform. Direct profile viewing is not available.

messages.title: Federation Messages
messages.subtitle: Send and receive messages with members from partner communities.
messages.federation_not_enabled_description: Enable federation to send and receive messages with partner communities.
messages.optin_required_description: You need to opt into federation before sending messages to partner communities.
messages.unable_to_load_description: Could not load your federation messages. Please try again.
messages.no_messages_description: Send your first message to a member from a partner community.
messages.select_conversation_description: Choose a conversation from the list to read and reply.
messages.auto_translate_active_banner: Messages are being auto-translated to your language.
messages.send_error: Could not send message. Please try again.
messages.send_error_retry: A network error occurred. Please try again.
messages.load_error_retry: A network error occurred. Please try again.
messages.external_recipient_info: This message will be sent to an external partner server.

listings.subtitle: Browse offers and requests from members across partner communities.
listings.load_error: Could not load listings. Please try again.
listings.no_listings_description: No listings are available in partner communities yet.

settings.heading: Federation Settings
settings.subheading: Control how your profile and activity are shared with partner communities.
settings.federation_active_description: Your profile is visible to partner communities.
settings.federation_disabled_description: Enable federation to connect with partner communities.
settings.show_profile_description: Allow partner communities to see your profile.
settings.appear_search_description: Allow your profile to appear in federation member search.
settings.share_skills_description: Share your skills and interests with partner communities.
settings.share_location_description: Share your approximate location with partner communities.
settings.show_reviews_description: Allow partner communities to see your reviews.

show_reviews_federated.help: Reviews from your local community are visible to federation partners.

settings.allow_messaging_description: Allow members from partner communities to send you messages.
settings.allow_transactions_description: Allow members from partner communities to send you time credits.
settings.email_notifications_description: Receive email notifications for federation messages and activity.
settings.travel_radius_description: Maximum distance you are willing to travel.

settings.load_error_retry: A network error occurred. Please try again.
settings.toggle_error: Could not {{action}} federation. Please try again.
settings.save_success_description: Your federation settings have been updated.
settings.save_failed_description: Could not save settings. Please try again.
settings.save_failed_retry: A network error occurred. Please try again.
